title: LLDAP
description: Lightweight authentication server providing a simplified, opinionated LDAP interface with a clean web UI for user and group management.
installation: LLDAP exposes its web admin UI on port 17170 and an LDAP endpoint on port 3890 (LDAP is not HTTP; expose it separately if other apps must bind to it). ROTATE these template defaults before production: LLDAP_JWT_SECRET and LLDAP_KEY_SEED (generate with `openssl rand -hex 32`), and LLDAP_LDAP_USER_PASS (the initial admin password for the bind user 'admin'). On first run log in at the app URL with admin / the LLDAP_LDAP_USER_PASS value, then create users/groups. This spec uses the bundled Postgres add-on via LLDAP_DATABASE_URL; if you prefer the default embedded SQLite store, remove the postgres add-on and LLDAP_DATABASE_URL and keep the /data volume. Adjust LLDAP_LDAP_BASE_DN to your domain.
